message:
perf(renderers): add #[inline] to doom/quake renderer helpers + buffer stack ops

Add #[inline] hints to small helper functions called from render inner loops:
- doom: clip_near_plane, get_seg_front_sector, get_seg_back_sector
- quake: face_base_color
- buffer: push_scissor, pop_scissor, push_opacity, pop_opacity

Closes bd-34ct2, bd-1jvca. Follows bd-1r1qb and bd-2j6fz pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
